name: HSBC Live+ Credit Card

domestic: 4 complimentary domestic airport lounge visits per year, one per quarter

exclusions: transactions excluded under HSBC Live+ Credit Card cashback terms
milestoneBenefits: Annual fee waived on annual spends above Rs 2 lakh
additionalBenefits: Rs 1,000 cashback after logging into HSBC India app and spending Rs 20,000 within first 30 days
Voucher worth up to Rs 500 for Amazon Pay, Zomato and Swiggy on activation with a single transaction of Rs 300 or more
10% cashback on dining, food delivery and grocery spends, capped at Rs 1,000 per month
1.5% unlimited cashback on most other eligible spends
4 complimentary domestic airport lounge visits per year, one per quarter
Free 12-month Times Prime subscription, subject to Visa Signature terms
Complimentary flight seat selections twice a year on domestic flights booked with MakeMyTrip
District by Zomato dining and movie offers, subject to terms

salaried: Age 18 to 65 years, Indian resident, minimum income Rs 6 lakh per year and eligible city residence
selfEmployed: Age 25 to 65 years, Indian resident, minimum income Rs 12 lakh per year and eligible city residence
